text.message: ive been 3rd or 4tf for like 10 games in a row now
I think I’d prefer to be last here lol
i spoke too early this board ok for late picks
I also was complaining about being last a lot before this game haha
cant remember the last time i had 1st or 2nd
Can we all agree to not complain a ton and go over board if we get blocked when we think it should be some one else? I’m getting tired of that lol
I was robbed 11 times last game and everyone else 2 or 3 times and finished on 7 pts
Or worse, over react when you get blocked in a close game and your just mad you were blocked instead of the other player
That just sounds like a whole lotta steals in general lol
i just wish there was a logic test before u could play on colonist
we would all be better off
That was gonna be my first expansion
Should have robbed red... he had tree
Fair, but it was a comment in good fun
ive got this 12 locked down lol
solo is kinda aggro here, no?
Wish I could keep on 8 ore, that is next best unfortunately
And you potentially have a knight for it
i get i am ahead but not by much tbh
Definitely blk is the block and rob
thats tuff to gather and not 7 out
